name: Parmesan Round Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from steak; pound to 1/2 inch thickness.
2. Cut steak into serving size pieces.
3. Combine egg and milk; beat well.
4. Combine breadcrumbs, 1 tablespoon salt, pepper, and Ac'cent. Dip steak in egg mixture, dredge in breadcrumb mixture, and brown in bacon drippings.
5. Place steak in a lightly greased 2 quart baking dish. Add water and sprinkle with oregano and cheese.
6. Add onions to steak; sprinkle with 1/4 teaspoon salt and paprika.
7. Cover tightly and bake at 325 degrees for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until tender.
